author: Verified Reviewer
pros: ZEMA provides amazing data management services with optimal and efficient operational speeds. Makes work very easy with automated curves and quick refresh times.
cons: Initial processes and customer help could be a little better.

description: Overall postive experience, since its quite good to have an database with all the datapoints in one place
author: Yugank J.
pros: Well, it's a great data aggregator. We use multiple 3rd party databases and having them all in one place and extracting them via Odata is where Zema is most helpful. Apart from Market analyser, Curve Managers helps build custom curves that is a great tool. Plus, you can chart some technical functions as well.
cons: Overall portal crashes a lot, and some data updates often lag behind market data which delays timely updates on reports

description: Overall Happy with the functionality and cannot fault the support team
author: Lakhbir B.
pros: Ease of setting up need processors and configuring new curves
cons: logging could be improved and alerts when no data is uploaded from source

author: Konstantin G.
pros: A very efficient organiser of price data, choice of multiple sourcing from emails, websites, ftp servers and even pdf reports, price data organisation from forward curve construction angle, ability to construct independent curves using multiple data sources and automate it, easy integration to various downstream systems (CTRMs, ETRMs etc), single sour of price data across organisation, off-the-shelf product, Zema personnel experience in price curve management needs, easily saves consultants and developers cost to design and build a tool that only does 10% of what Zema is already doing.
cons: I would expect Zema to be more involved with current and potential users on training and explaining various features of the product. Most of the time users have to do a lot of self-learning through trial-and-error exercises

author: Thomas B.
pros: The speed and collaboration of the ZE Group and our company has been exceptional. If we have questions they have been on point with responses. We are installing a new ETRM and ZE has worked with the vendor without issue to get both systems in on schedule.
cons: I've known of ZEMA for 13 years and have yet to run into a major issue.
author_profession: Trading Systems SME and Implementation Specialist

description: great experience with ze, been with them 9+ years
author: Habib S.
pros: overall the application is great, its tailored to fit every company, the software is mature, not alot of bugs
cons: the only thing that stands out as a con is that their pricing is abit high, but you are getting a great service

review_title: A great tool for a robust pricing mechanism for daily EOD needs
author: Ankit V.
pros: The prompt customer support which is available in case of any unforeseen issues is very appreciable from ZEMA team. The business analysts at the customer support are well trained and commit to providing a resolution as per the criticality of data needs for our daily EOD work makes us feel assured to meet our targets on time without much delay.
cons: The self-ticket generation tool can be remodeled to be more user friendly and less time consuming in case we require to raise tickets ourselves.

author: Jay B.
pros: Zema helps us to get data, make curves, analytic using single or multiple sources which helps us make our dashboard
cons: back tracing OData query at times is difficult.

description: Reasonable. The set up took a long time and there was a lot of confusion regarding the login. That's also to do with our internal set up as well. But once it's set up...using it has been reasonably ok.
author: Chet S.
pros: The web interface is convenient but not the fastest. Python API's are reasonably well set up...but more work could be done with making it easier to use for US focused products. More templates for specific examples (US power and gas) would be helpful - I guess I haven't seen them yet.
cons: Haven't used the full capabilities yet. So far.......nothing to hate on at this time

review_title: Essential curve building tool and interface
author: Yik Ming C.
pros: curve analysis and building and used it to interface from ZEMA to current ERP system.
cons: support model in Asia Pacificnot so much of user friendliness, need much more training support

author: aaron C.
pros: raw data collecting/parsing and download the data
cons: hard to find the data saved based on categorized filter

review_title: ZEMA Is Important for Our Needs, Wants, and Many Purposes
author: Carlos D.
pros: The data analytics, integration, and automation capabilities of ZEMA are essential to our needs.
cons: It can sometimes be a bit slow (although not often), depending on if the amount of data you are retrieving is too large.

author: Gautam B.
pros: ZEMA is reliable software and we can depend on it
cons: Can be made more user friendly for our users

description: Not able to achieve the data formats in excel output required
author: Samuel C.
pros: Wide Variety of Database/ Datasource and allows for consolidation of different data needs across the business
cons: Not able to display different database e.g. Baltic + Crude + FX in 1 tableNot able to display Forward rates e.g. FFA in desired format of 1 row of data per day

description: ZEMA is a good product! It works!
author: Thomas M.
pros: Broad range of data parsers spanning multiple industries. This software gives access to a wide-range of data that is valuable to any company. And if it's not currently available, the vendor can develop it in a short period of time.
cons: Certain in-depth functionality would be nice to have particularly in managing curves.

description: I've been using Zema for 7 years working as a trading analyst and other roles. The software has a lot of functionalities and is a powerful data vehicle, however simple things around the customer service are tarnishing the overall experience. Lately we've been trying to add a new pricing curve and the messy and slow communication with the support team made something as simple as that to get dragging unsolved for months. we kept going in circles without been given clear explanation about the nature of the process, additional costs and time for implementation. Honestly, if our parent company wasn't tied up with an enterprise contract we'd definitely consider switching to different product .
author: Sonya G.
pros: The software has a large range of data analysis tools and functionalities.
cons: the customer support is slow and not as helpful as expected

author: Tiago F.
pros: Mainly the appearance
cons: Maybe the lack of validations and debugging

description: the best part is Zema support is really great. Even sometimes take more time due to time zone, but service is really great.
author: Hong L.
pros: Build Market Analytic, applied formula, create curve.
cons: sometimes that I have to manually rebuild curve even just loaded in from processor.

description: Add intelisense to the table columns in sql query will be helpful
author: Zhuoming L.
pros: It helps to get market data for all markets
cons: Incomplete data set make it unusable, some data set has a gap, some data sets missing values

review_title: Zema: good product but with some improvements it could be great
author: adrian C.
pros: The ease of creating custom calculations using the pricing data
cons: Limited userbase. This product would be better if non-users could view dashboards via a web interface

author: Mikko A.
pros: Centralized data feed to operational IT tools
cons: Not really missing any critical features

review_title: User review - Great 24/7 support, minimal to no issues
author: Davit S.
pros: Price flow automation. Amazing support team. Constant updates and follow up by the team.
cons: At first, ZEMA is not the most user friendly platform. However, once you get used to navigating the system, it is fairly simple to use.

description: The ze has amazing technical team had pleasure working with few folks i would to mention [SENSITIVE CONTENT] other people i forget the names everyone is very responsive and address any issues on timely manner which is key for any product after going live
author: Avinash K.
pros: Its very robust and handles all our data needs
cons: Quick turn around time on delivery on the custom requirement to fetch data from any website

description: We rely a great deal on the retrieval of market data for down stream systems. it is a great tool for this and more importantly we don't have to be in the business of updating scrapes when market data format changes source or data.
author: Greg G.
pros: API is the most important for daily use and then IPV next for monthly submission.
cons: Dashboard view expected datasets and status ability to re-run missing datasets AD-HOC if and when needed.

review_title: ZEMA fits our data ingestion and curve building needs for ETRM processing and fundamentals data
author: Jay R.
pros: ZEMA fits our data ingestion and curve building needs for ETRM processing and fundamentals data. ZE is easy to do business with and acts in good faith as a partner
cons: ZE support is very responsive, but mostly re-active not pro-active
